items.name: Strength
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: []. Key: attr.body.strength. Canonical name carrier: descriptor_registry, names_index (enforce: warn).

items.name: Endurance
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Vitality]. Key: attr.body.endurance. Carries Stamina = Endurance x 5 derivation.

items.name: Agility
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Dexterity]. Key: attr.body.agility. STRUCK from Combat Pool (ED-900/904).

items.name: Focus
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: attr.mind.focus. Lives in Concentration = 3xFocus + 2xSpirit (config.py:61).

items.name: Acuity
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Reasoning, Cognition]. Key: attr.mind.acuity. Glossary calls it Cognition; registry calls it Acuity.

items.name: Will
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Spirit]. Key: attr.mind.will. Registry: Will primary; glossary: Spirit primary.

items.name: Attunement
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Perception]. Key: attr.social.attunement.

items.name: Charisma
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Influence, Presence]. Key: attr.social.charisma. Drives Composure = Charisma x 3.

items.name: Bonds
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Aliases: [Sincerity, Affability]. Key: attr.social.bonds. NOT in glossary.md attribute table.

items.name: Body
items.detail: Aggregate (placeholder, NOT wired). Computed: sum(Strength, Endurance, Agility). Key: agg.body. Status: placeholder.

items.name: Mind
items.detail: Aggregate (placeholder). Computed: sum(Focus, Acuity, Will). Key: agg.mind. Status: placeholder.

items.name: Social
items.detail: Aggregate (placeholder). Computed: sum(Attunement, Charisma, Bonds). Key: agg.social. Status: placeholder.

items.name: Influence
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: fac.influence. 'Social and cultural reach. Cannot drop below 1.'

items.name: Wealth
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: fac.wealth. '0 = cannot Trade or fund Wealth-requiring actions.'

items.name: Military
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: fac.military. '0 = cannot Muster.'

items.name: Intel
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: fac.intel. 'Intelligence capacity.'

items.name: Stability
items.detail: Scale 1-7. Key: fac.stability. '0 = Collapse trigger (P-15).'

items.name: Legitimacy
items.detail: Scale 0-7. Key: set.legitimacy. Component of Mandate derivation (two formulas exist).

items.name: Popular Support
items.detail: Scale 0-7. Key: set.popular_support. Component of Mandate derivation.

items.name: Prosperity
items.detail: Scale 0-5. Key: set.prosperity. Enters Mandate size-weighting formula.

items.name: Defense
items.detail: Scale 0-5. Key: set.defense.

items.name: Order
items.detail: Scale 0-5. Key: set.order.

items.name: Combat Pool
items.detail: CURRENT: max(5, Relevant History + 6) per params/core.md:161 (ED-900/904). STRUCK: (Agility x 2) + History + 3 still in values_master.

items.name: Stamina
items.detail: Formula: Endurance x 5. Range 5-35. Combat resource.

items.name: Health
items.detail: Formula: (Endurance + 6) x (max Wounds + 1). Wound track, never resets.

items.name: Coherence
items.detail: Formula: 10 (starting); countdown to 0. Range 0-10. At 0: character becomes NPC (PP-261).

items.name: Composure
items.detail: Formula: Charisma x 3. Social endurance track. Debate resource.

items.name: Concentration
items.detail: Formula: 3xFocus + 2xSpirit (Jordan 2026-06-03). Debate resource.

items.name: Thread Fatigue
items.detail: Formula: Spirit x 5 (threshold). Range 5-35.

items.name: Thread Sensitivity
items.detail: Scale 0-100+. 'Perception depth and operation eligibility. Determines accessible operation scale.' UNREGISTERED in descriptor_registry.

items.name: Thread Pool Score
items.detail: Formula: Thread Sensitivity / 10 (round down). 'Bonus dice added to Thread operation pools.' UNREGISTERED.

items.name: Resolve
items.detail: Formula: Spirit. Range 1-7.

items.name: Certainty
items.detail: Formula: 5 (starting, varies by background). Range 0-5. Cosmological worldview track.

items.name: Mending Stability
items.detail: Range 100->0. Renamed from 'Rendering Stability' per ED-731. Baseline decay: -1 per in-game year (PP-255).

items.name: Church Influence
items.detail: Range 0-100. Thresholds: 40=Assertive, 55=Reach, 60+=Seizure, 65=Dominant, 80=Ascendant, 100=Theocracy.

items.name: Institutional Pressure
items.detail: Range 0-100. 'Invasion threat tracker.' Start: 20. Threshold 75/80 = Altonian Vanguard (BG).

items.name: Mandate
items.detail: LINEAR (params/factions_personal.md:14): round(0.5 x Legitimacy + 0.5 x Popular_Support). SATURATING (module_contracts.yaml:600): clamp(round(7T/(T+6)), 0-7) where T=sum W_s*(q_s/7), q_s=0.5L+0.5PS.

items.name: Piety Track
items.detail: Range 0-10. Debate position tracker. 'Side A wins >=7; Side B <=3. Compromise 4-6.'

items.name: Disposition
items.detail: Range -5..+5 (flat, post-ED-912). 'NPC attitude state. Drives behaviour-tree branching.' Formerly Bonds-capped.

items.name: Renown
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; NO DEFINITION exists.

items.name: Standing
items.detail: Range 0-10 (exception to 1-7 scale). 'Reputation track. No benefit above 7; 10 is cosmetic max.'

items.name: Persuasion
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; NO DEFINITION exists.

items.name: Evidence
items.detail: Listed as 'Evidence' in not_descriptors; carried in fieldwork_v30.

items.name: Combat
items.detail: Current formula: max(5, History+6) per params/core.md:161.

items.name: Argue
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; formula in social_contest_v30.

items.name: Thread
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; Thread-layer operations.

items.name: Fieldwork
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; personal fieldwork scale.

items.name: Knot
items.detail: Formula: (Bonds x 2) + 3 per mechanics_index.yaml:350. Tiers: distant -2..+5, close -5..+5.

items.name: MassCombat
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; params/mass_combat.md carries content.

items.name: FactionDomain
items.detail: Listed in not_descriptors; faction-level action pool.

findings.claim: Combat Pool triple-carried: values_master.yaml:212 lists (Agility x 2)+History+3 filed under nonexistent params/combat.md; values_master.yaml:1150 lists (Agility x 2)+weapon-History+3 filed under params/core.md; canonical params/core.md:161 specifies max(5, History+6) only.
findings.evidence: values_master.yaml:212 (pre-ED-901 struck formula, params/combat.md does not exist), values_master.yaml:1150 (stale source), params/core.md:161 (canonical: 'ratified 2026-05-29 R1 (ED-901; re-ratified ED-900/904)', 'Supersedes the struck (Agility x 2) + History + 3 form')

findings.claim: Mandate formula dual-carried, incompatible: params/factions_personal.md:14 carries linear round(0.5xLegitimacy + 0.5xPopular_Support); module_contracts.yaml:600 carries saturating clamp(round(7T/(T+6)), 0-7) where T is size-weighted settlement aggregate.
findings.evidence: params/factions_personal.md:14 ('backward-compat' note suggests linear is stale), module_contracts.yaml:563,600 ('Lesson-5 bound, saturating form, Stage-4 sim validated')

findings.claim: Acuity vs Cognition: descriptor_registry.yaml:39 lists Acuity as primary (attr.mind.acuity, aliases: [Reasoning, Cognition]); glossary.md:37 lists Cognition as primary with no Acuity mention; names_index.yaml:49 marks Cognition as legacy alias (enforce: warn).
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:39 (primary: Acuity), glossary.md:37 (primary: Cognition), ED-IN-0008 (documented conflict)

findings.claim: Will vs Spirit: descriptor_registry.yaml:40 lists Will as primary (attr.mind.will, alias: Spirit); glossary.md:40 lists Spirit as primary; config.py:61 and params/core.md:247 use Spirit in live formulas (Concentration, Thread-Read pool).
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:40 (primary: Will), glossary.md:40 (primary: Spirit), config.py:61 (CONC_SPIRIT=2.0), params/core.md:247 ('Spirit x 2 + History + TPS')

findings.claim: Bonds absent from glossary.md attribute roster: glossary lists 7 attributes; descriptor_registry carries 9 (3 body + 3 mind + 3 social). Bonds is missing from glossary.
findings.evidence: glossary.md:27-41 (7-attribute table, no Bonds), descriptor_registry.yaml:30-44 (9-attribute roster, Bonds at line 44), glossary.md:31 (warning: 'conflicts with descriptor_registry's 9-attribute roster')

findings.claim: Thread Sensitivity (TS) load-bearing practitioner stat (0-100+ scale, determines Thread operation eligibility, thresholds 30/50+) has no registry key: not in descriptor_registry, not in not_descriptors, not in names_index.
findings.evidence: glossary.md:60 (TS definition, live stat), mechanics_index.yaml:359 (thread_leap depends on TS), params/core.md:149 ('TS >= 30 Knot formation prerequisite')

findings.claim: Thread Pool Score (TPS, formula TS/10) is derived bonus-dice source in live formulas (params/core.md:247 Thread-Read pool = Spirit x 2 + History + TPS) but unregistered: no key in descriptor_registry, not_descriptors, or names_index.
findings.evidence: glossary.md:61 (TPS definition), params/core.md:247 (TPS in live Thread-Read formula)

findings.claim: Renown listed in not_descriptors:tracks but never defined: descriptor_registry.yaml:108 lists it; no scale or formula anywhere.
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:108 (not_descriptors tracks: [Piety, Disposition, Renown, Standing, Persuasion])

findings.claim: Persuasion listed in not_descriptors:tracks but never defined: descriptor_registry.yaml:108 lists it; no scale or formula.

not_descriptors uses abbreviations (CI, MS, IP) while glossary/names_index use full names; names_index.yaml MIRRORS block (line 28-32) omits not_descriptors, so tools/ci_names_consistency.py never validates abbreviation vs full-name consistency for clocks/pools/tracks.
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:109 (not_descriptors: [... CI, ... MS, ... IP ...]), glossary.md:70-75 (full names: 'Church Influence', 'Mending Stability', 'Institutional Pressure'), names_index.yaml:28-32 (MIRRORS section lists attr/agg/fac/set only)

findings.claim: Rendering Stability (RS) name mismatch: glossary.md:73 correctly shows 'Renamed from Rendering Stability per ED-731'; values_master.yaml:190 header still references 'Rendering Stability (start)'; mechanics_index.yaml:778 still labels entry 'rs_track' as 'Rendering Stability world-track'.
findings.evidence: glossary.md:73 (current: Mending Stability, prior: Rendering Stability), values_master.yaml:190 (still says 'Rendering Stability (start)'), mechanics_index.yaml:778 (rs_track entry: 'Rendering Stability world-track')

findings.claim: values_master.yaml quarantined-stale (ED-1084 banner): ~70 entries under nonexistent params/combat.md (struck Combat Pool formula), 8 entries leak from deliberately-superseded params/threadwork_superseded.md, generator tool (tools/extract_values.py) is dead (imports retired github_ops). No CI round-trip drift detection for prose.
findings.evidence: values_master.yaml:7-24 (QUARANTINED banner, documented rot: 70 entries + 8 entries + generator dead), CLAUDE.md §5 (numbers live as prose, not typed data; no typed engine-params yet), tools/extract_values.py (dead)

findings.claim: Knot pool formula (Bonds x 2) + 3 lives in mechanics_index.yaml:350 and params prose but has no registry key: knots.pool not in key_type_registry_v30.md, knots mechanic module_contracts.yaml does not list pool in Key payload fields.
findings.evidence: mechanics_index.yaml:350 (primitives:pool: '(Bonds*2)+3'), key_type_registry_v30.md: zero knots.pool entry, module_contracts.yaml knots entry: lists impact_vector (strain) but not pool

findings.claim: descriptor_registry.yaml aggregates marked 'status: placeholder' (agg.body/mind/social lines 49-51) but no CI enforcement that they are not yet to be used; only a comment notes they are placeholders. names_index.yaml enforce: warn does not treat placeholders as blocked.
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:49-51 (status: placeholder), CLAUDE.md §8 (no rule enforcing placeholder-status blocks)

coverage_notes: SWEPT: descriptor_registry.yaml (all sections: attributes, aggregates, faction_stats, settlement_stats, by_reference, deprecated, not_descriptors); names_index.yaml (attr/agg/fac/set entries, proper-noun corpus noted but names not individually audited); glossary.md (Parts 1-8: attributes, derived stats, practitioner stats, world clocks, debate, combat, world/narrative, thread operations); values_master.yaml (header/schema/conflicts/full index sample for cross-file collisions); mechanics_index.yaml (schema + sample mechanics entries for quantity-bearing cross-references); canon sources: params/core.md (Pool Minimum, Attributes, Derived Scores, Combat Pool canon, MS Baseline Decay), params/factions_personal.md (Mandate formulas), params/campaign_modes.md (clock start values), module_contracts.yaml (Mandate saturating form, faction/settlement state scope, Knot pool). SKIPPED: (1) references/engine_params/combat_engine_v1.json (Class-C typed export; scope is prose registry layer only). (2) Proper-noun subfolders in names_index.yaml (world.* entries for NPCs/territories/factions — scope is attributes/quantities, not proper nouns). (3) Deprecated section resonance_style (ED-IN-0025 already tracked). (4) Full mechanics_index.yaml sweep (audit focused on quantity definitions, not all mechanic descriptions; only quantity-bearing entries sampled). (5) not_descriptors formula-lookup beyond registry lists (Argue, Thread, Fieldwork, MassCombat pools — formulas deferred to design-doc read). (6) by_reference entries (conv.*, axis.*, style.*, temp.* — structures sampled, canonical sources outside F-REG family). DETERMINISTIC EXTRACTION: All formulas verbatim with file:line citations; no interpretation or summarization.
